summary: Preinstall hook exfiltrates host/user identifiers to bare-IP C2 and Interactsh OAST domain
details: On `npm install`, the package's preinstall lifecycle script runs index.js, which collects host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.userInfo().username, __dirname, process.cwd()) and exfiltrates them through two channels: (1) hex-encoded DNS subdomain queries to a *.oast.live (Interactsh) callback domain, and (2) an HTTP POST to the bare IP 172.201.213.59 on port 9090 path /c. The data collection and outbound calls fire automatically on a default install with no user action required. The package contents are limited to this exfiltration script — there is no legitimate library functionality. Behavior matches supply-chain reconnaissance / dependency-confusion probing.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
